hooks.command:
printf 'shopify-claude-quickstart loaded.

First time on this store?
  /init-store STORE.myshopify.com   - auth, theme pull, audit, fill CLAUDE.md
  /brief-interview                  - fill in client-brief/ conversationally
  /brief-quick                      - single-file lightweight brief

Returning?
  /recover-context                  - re-anchor on where we left off

Building?
  /brand-system  /design-intake  /implement-mockup-module
  /homepage-from-brief  /pdp-audit  /metafield-schema  /nav-build  /seo-audit  /alt-text  ...
  Type /  to see all commands.

Reminders:
  - Validate GraphQL with shopify-plugin:shopify-admin BEFORE executing
  - Mutations require --allow-mutations on shopify store execute
  - Push to a DEV theme first, never live
  - Run /log-session before closing
'
